title: Cuneiform Tablet #0484: Early Dynastic Royal Inscription
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Royal Inscription document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records royal inscription matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
